markets.no_sub_title: Chet Holmgren
markets.rules_primary: If Chet Holmgren records a Double Double in the Oklahoma City at Philadelphia professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 23, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Statistics are considered final at the conclusion of the specified time period of the basketball game. Statistics that count towards a double double include points, rebounds, assists, blocks, and steals. Any combination of 10+ in 2 or more of these statistics results in a double double. Corrections made after the game ends will not affect resolution. Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If the game is cancelled before starting, markets resolve to last fair price. If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.

Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If the game is cancelled before starting, markets resolve to last fair price. If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.
